{{Expand}}

{{Infobox icon
| name = Lemon's insignia
| introduced = The Pilot
}}

== The Pilot ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Lemon]] wears a golden 'L' on her suit.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c30">''The Pilot'', chapter 30</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Icons]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
